chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.832 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on office objection a/w reply of advocate 2.For orders on M.A. No.635/25 3.For hg of case 14.01.2026. Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF does not press this application for cancellation of bail on the ground that it has become infructuous as the respondents/accused have been acquitted under section 265-K Cr. P.C. by the trial Court. Order accordingly. This application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
